title: Simulation Unit A+B Live Promotion Packager Worker v1
determinism: Must package only declared Unit A and Unit B live-candidate SQL artifacts.
Must not promote SQL into live init surfaces in this phase.
Must not write to AI-control roots.

notes: Packaging scope is limited to the combined Unit A + Unit B live-candidate set in this phase.
Output is a combined live-promotion candidate pack only.
Any live promotion requires a later explicit owner-approved phase.
